Studio & Gallery

Years in Clay
Hwy 16
Telkwa, BC
Welcome

Studio and Gallery

Art and Soul Pottery Studio and Gallery is located at 1269 Hwy 16, Telkwa, BC and is your source to handmade, artistic and functional pottery.

Offering a wide range of food, microwave and oven safe pottery by Franziska Cody, as well as crafts from local artisans, Art and Soul Pottery also supports artisans from around the world by offering their products through the gallery.

The "working studio" provides the opportunity to witness the process of creating pottery and to custom make items to meet specific interests.

What We Offer

Browse Our Collections

Pottery Gallery

Functional dinnerware, decorative vessels, vases, mugs and more — all handmade, food safe and oven safe.

View Gallery

Other Artwork

Paintings, sculptures, murals, cards, photography — by Franziska and other local artisans.

View Artwork

Other Gifts

Silver and gem jewellery, bags and prayer flags from Nepal and Thailand, and other unique gifts.

View Gifts
Working Studio

Watch Pottery Come to Life

Watch a piece being created from start to finish in the working studio

Custom orders available — combining form, colour and images in unique ways to suit your interests

All pottery is food safe, microwave safe and oven safe — fired to 1220°C

Supporting local and international artisans through the gallery

Plan Your Visit

Tuesday By appointment

Thursday 10am — 5pm
Friday By appointment
Sat & Sun By appointment
Call 250-846-5727 Email Us

"Inside this clay jug, there are canyons and pine mountains, and the maker of canyons and pine mountains. All seven oceans are inside and hundreds of millions of stars."

"If you want the truth, I will tell you; friend listen: the god I love is inside!"

— Kabir
Meet the Artist

Handmade, artistic and functional pottery by Franziska Cody. Located in the beautiful Bulkley Valley, Telkwa, BC.
